title: nerine undulata var. major
intro: Nerine undulata var. major, commonly known as the Large-Flowered Nerine or Pink Lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nerine undulata var. major include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
